hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json,subprocess,os; d=json.load(sys.stdin) if not sys.stdin.isatty() else {}; f=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); r=subprocess.run(['python3','-m','py_compile',f],capture_output=True,text=True) if f.endswith('.py') else None; print(r.stderr.strip()) if r and r.returncode!=0 else None"
